title: MTR Low Effort British Rail Class 150
description: Low Effort British Rail Class 150 for MTR mod!
body:
# Low Effort British Rail Class 150
This pack features remodified versions of [Navi's (LX9702)](https://modrinth.com/user/LX9702) British Rail Class 507 & 508.
![Class 150/0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed580b50b07eff7c630061ad4c5c39b2285e681c.png)
## Trains
- Class 150/0
  - Blank
  - Regional Railways
  - Great Western Railway
  - Northern Trains
  - Merseyrail
- Class 150/1
  - Regional Railways (Variant 1)
  - Regional Railways (Variant 2)
  - Provincial
  - Provincial (White cab door)
  - Centro
  - GMPTE
  - First Great Western
- Class 150/2
  - Blank
  - Regional Railways (Early livery)
  - Regional Railways
  - First Great Western
  - Great Western Railway
  - Northern Trains
  - Merseyrail
  - Transport for Wales
- Class 154
  - Regional Railways
